tracks.meaning: a potential customer or client who may be interested in buying a product or service
a financial investment opportunity or venture that may yield returns
the act of exploring or searching for something, particularly in mining or geological surveying
a view or vista from a particular vantage point, especially of a landscape or scenery
a person's outlook, expectation, or anticipated future situation
the likely or possible direction in which something or someone will move or develop
a likelihood or chance that something will happen or be successful
an area of land that shows signs of mineral deposits and is worth exploring for mining
a view of the stage or visible area of a theatre from a particular seating location
